metadata.name: Tetsu Kasuya God/Devil
metadata.author: Tetsu Kasuya
metadata.description: Hario Switch recipe. Open-valve hot percolation for the first 120g, then close the valve for cool immersion to 280g. Requires a gooseneck kettle with adjustable temperature.

protocol.notes: Pour 60g more to 120g total — still at 90°C. Begin lowering kettle temperature to 70°C now.
Wait until ~1:15. Ensure water is at 70°C before next step.
CLOSE valve, then pour 160g at 70°C to 280g total — immersion phase begins
OPEN valve — drain. Aim to complete by 3-minute mark.
